name: eval datasets: every record across agents/ and skills/ has bootstrap_seed:true (origin from O-1 seed corpus)
command: find "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/evals/datasets" -name "*.jsonl" | while read f; do node -e 'require("fs").readFileSync("'"$f"'","utf8").trim().split("\n").forEach(l=>{const j=JSON.parse(l);if(j.bootstrap_seed!==true)throw new Error("FAIL: "+process.argv[1])})' "$f" || exit 1; done; echo ok 1>&2
